thesis_one_liner: Largest listed gold royalty company: debt-free, record cash generation, deep acquisition pipeline; quality premium at peak commodity prices limits base return.
key_assumptions: FY2025 owner cash $7.75/sh from $1,493.7M OCF on 192.7M shares
Producing stream capitalized at ~18.4× normalized owner cash (base $142/sh)
Development inventory risk-adjusted from $1.14B equity investments (base $18/sh)
Net financial claims include filing cash plus deployable credit capacity (base $28/sh)
Depletion reserve -$28/sh scales with commodity-price and operator realization risk
Cobre Panamá and development royalties excluded from Lawrence base growth
open_questions: Timing of Cobre Panamá formal restart vs GOP stockpile processing
Gold/silver price normalization impact on FY2026+ cash flow
Victoria Gold and Bullabulling acquisition close and GEO contribution
Confirm share count against next full MD&A extract
